'''Ather''' was a [[Factory world/Legends|manufacturing world]]<ref name="Tales">{{WEGCite|story=Tales of the Smoking Blaster|book=Star Wars Gamemaster Handbook|stext=Tales of the ''Smoking Blaster''}}</ref> located in the [[Ather system/Legends|Ather system]], a part of the [[Atravis sector/Legends|Atravis sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Western Reaches/Legends|Western Reaches]] portion of<ref name="Western Reaches" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The distance between Ather and<ref name="Tales" /> the [[Tamarin sector/Legends|Tamarin sector's]]<ref name="EAOC Dravian">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for the [[Dravian Starport system/Legends|star system]] containing [[Dravian Starport]]</ref> [[Dravian Starport]] could be traversed in two [[Standard day/Legends|days]] using a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] equipped with a Class 1 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]].<ref name="Tales" />

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Dravian Starport–based shipping company [[Nar Shaddaa Shipping]] offered [[free-trader]]s a job of [[Transport/Legends|transporting]] fifty [[Metric ton/Legends|tons]] of [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]] [[C-board|circuit boards]] to Ather for 3,500 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name="Tales" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ather was mentioned in "[[Tales of the Smoking Blaster|Tales of the ''Smoking Blaster'']]," a [[roleplaying game]] adventure written by [[Bill Smith]]. The adventure was included in ''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Handbook]]'', a [[1993]] sourcebook published by [[West End Games]] for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Tales" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Ather [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Ather itself, in grid square L-20.<ref name="TEA" />
